code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  for token in tokens
    let parsed = string.parse_int(token)
    match parsed
    when Some(v)
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      # skip non-integer tokens
    end
  end

  let max_val = list.max(nums).ok_or("no input")?
  let min_val = list.min(nums).ok_or("no input")?

  print("max=#{max_val}")
  print("min=#{min_val}")

  Ok(())
end
